title: ranunculus gregarius subsp. carpetanus
intro: Ranunculus gregarius subsp. carpetanus, a subspecies of the Ranunculus gregarius plant, is a perennial species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus gregarius subsp. carpetanus include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
